title: GEEZY 2 in 1 Plastic Cake Carrier with Lid and Handle Portable Round Transparent 11 inch Cake Storage Container Cake Box Two Sided Base for Cake and Cupcakes
features: FOOD-GRADE MATERIALS: The cake carrier is made from high-quality, PP plastic, this cake carrier is durable, reusable, and non-toxic, ensuring no harm to your food. This cake storage container keeps your food healthy, fresh, and hygienic. This cake holder is safe to use in the dishwasher.

SECURELY SEALABLE: This round cake carrier features a transparent lid with a triple buckle design on the bottom, ensuring perfect sealing to keep your cake moist and fresh while protecting it from dust and moisture. The clear lid showcases your delightful cake, enhancing its appeal. The secure closure prevents accidental spills, blocks odors, and allows for freezer storage.

CONSIDERED DESIGN: This cake holder includes an ergonomic handle and a dual-sided base for convenient use. The handle ensures easy and safe transportation, while the anti-slipped grain on the cake tray keeps the cake firmly in place during travel. The dual-sided base design allows you to store a 11 inch cake or various other items such as cupcakes, cookies, muffins, pizzas, and more.
VERSATILE USE: This cake carrier is ideal for sharing desserts at parties, picnics, BBQs, hiking, and more with family and friends. It is convenient and versatile to use indoor and outdoor.
Specifications: Packaging Dimensions: Height 13.5cm, Depth 28cm, Width 28cm, Weight 350gm / Item Dimensions: Height 14.5cm, Depth 28cm, Width 28cm / Brand: GEEZY / Material: Plastic
